name: ssepi-erp
description: SSEPI ERP - frontend estático con Supabase

scripts.sbom: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('./package.json'); fs.writeFileSync('sbom.json', JSON.stringify({bomVersion:1,specVersion:'1.4',metadata:{timestamp:new Date().toISOString()},components:[{type:'application',name:p.name,version:p.version}]},null,2)); console.log('sbom.json written');"
scripts.lint: echo 'Add ESLint and eslint-plugin-security for SAST; run: npx eslint js/ --ext .js'
